title: Pexe's Elemental Swords
description: A mod that adds 25+ unique swords that expands your possibilities in minecraft combat, can you conquer every element?
body:
Can you conquer of the 3 minecraft dimensions? 
This mod is a forge mod adds 20+ different swords to the game, each one of them have custom effects, attacks and looks! They expand the possibilities of Minecraft's combat. This mod's swords works well as secondary and primary weapons with most other mods! 

Any recipe viewing mod Is recommended.

If any bugs found, please report it 



### FAQ:

How do I craft ____ sword?\
Use Just Enough Items to be able to see the recipes


When this mod will update to ____ version?\
When the update is finished I will post it.

Will you downgrade this mod to ____ version?\
No

Can I use this in my modpack?\
Feel free to use this mod on your modpack

What does "pexe" mean?\
It means "fish".

What is the use of Sword of Lighting or the pSword of ____?\
These are developer swords, the pSwords of ____ are used for the creation of projectiles

Is this mod compatible with _____?\
Most likely, my mod is a very simple mod.

Will this mod be ported to fabric?\
At the moment no, but if I figure out a way to port a mcreator forge mod I will definitely try
